info.title: Activate API
info.description: API Documentation for the Activate account opening and compliance system

get.summary: Get current staff profile using Orchestro SSO token

post.summary: Validate an Orchestro token from Authorization header

get.summary: Get permissions for the current staff member
Get current staff hierarchy context
Get list of team members under current staff
Get RM activity logs (paginated, with optional filters)

parameters.name: staffId
parameters.description: Filter activity logs by specific Staff ID / RM ID

parameters.name: action
parameters.description: Filter by specific log action (e.g. INITIATED_ACCOUNT_OPENING)

parameters.name: module
parameters.description: Filter by specific application module (e.g. ACCOUNT_OPENING)

200.description: List of activity logs retrieved successfully.

post.summary: Verify PIN and get a 20-minute token to reveal sensitive data

200.description: PIN verified successfully, reveal token issued.

401.description: Invalid PIN or staff ID mismatch

get.summary: Reveal unmasked customer sensitive identity biodata
Reveal real-time unmasked account balance from CBA

post.summary: Start BVN or NIN verification (Step 1)

200.description: Verification session started and validation code generation enqueued.

message.example: Identity verification started and enqueued successfully.

post.summary: Input OTP code received by customer (Step 2)

200.description: OTP code validation and biodata extraction enqueued.

message.example: Verification code submitted to the background verification queue.

post.summary: Confirm customer biodata details and additional details like email, second phone, NIN and address (Step 3)

200.description: Biodata details and additional information successfully confirmed.

post.summary: Submit customer field photo for face match (Step 3)

message.example: Facial matching check enqueued for background verification.

post.summary: Switch to manual verification mode if auto fails

reason.example: Customer unable to access iGree link due to poor network

200.description: Manual fallback mode activated and RM task spawned.

manualModeReason.example: OTP not received by customer after multiple retries.

post.summary: Operations manually verifies and approves identity verification
Operations manually rejects/fails identity verification

get.summary: Fetch manual identity verification sessions filtered by status (PENDING, APPROVED, REJECTED)

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Filter by pending, approved, or rejected. Defaults to pending.

get.summary: Get current status and biodata details of a verification session
Get current RM task list

200.description: List of tasks assigned to the Relationship Manager.

description.example: Request REQ-20260518-0001 was rejected by Ops. Reason: Customer picture is blurred.

get.summary: Get the count of pending tasks assigned to the logged-in staff
Get details of a specific task by its UUID

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: UUID of the task to retrieve

post.summary: Mark a task as completed

description.example: Request REQ-20260518-0001 was rejected by Ops. Reason: Customer picture is blurred.

post.summary: Cancel a task

description.example: Request REQ-20260518-0001 was rejected by Ops. Reason: Customer picture is blurred.

post.summary: Initiate savings/current account opening request (Step 1)
Cancel and restart account opening request
Retry a failed account request

200.description: Failed request successfully scheduled for retry.

get.summary: Get account opening requests for currently authenticated RM

200.description: List of account requests initiated by the RM.

get.summary: Get all account requests across the system (paginated)

200.description: List of all account requests returned successfully.

get.summary: Check if an account of a specific type already exists or is in progress for the customer

message.example: Account type is available for onboarding.

get.summary: Get details of an account request by ID
Enquiry real-time details of an account from BankOne

parameters.name: x-reveal-token
parameters.description: A valid active PIN Reveal session token to view unmasked balances and sensitive identifiers

get.summary: Get a list of all bank accounts currently on an active compliance lien hold

200.description: List of active liens successfully retrieved.

post.summary: Place a hold/lien on a customer account — Requires PIN Verification

parameters.name: x-reveal-token
parameters.description: A valid active PIN Reveal token acquired from verification

200.description: Hold applied successfully to the customer account on the Core Banking Application.

message.example: Lien placed successfully on BankOne CBA

post.summary: Remove a hold/lien from a customer account — Requires PIN Verification

parameters.name: x-reveal-token
parameters.description: A valid active PIN Reveal token acquired from verification

200.description: Hold successfully released from the customer account.

message.example: Lien removed successfully on BankOne CBA

get.summary: Get account requests by compliance status (Pending, Reviewed, or Rejected)

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Filter requests by compliance status: pending, reviewed, or rejected. Defaults to pending.

get.summary: Fetch a compliance review request by ID

200.description: Account opening request details retrieved successfully.

patch.summary: Allow Ops/RMs to edit and correct erroneous account data before approval

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: UUID of the account request to edit

post.summary: Approve an account request - Mark reviewed

comments.example: KYC documents are valid and verified.

post.summary: Reject an account request - Mark non-compliant

reason.example: Customer picture is blurred and fails biometric score.

200.description: Request marked non-compliant and task bank item created.

failureReason.example: Customer official ID card picture is blurred and illegible.

post.summary: Place a hold/lien on a customer account — Requires PIN Verification

parameters.name: x-reveal-token
parameters.description: A valid active PIN Reveal token acquired from verification

200.description: Hold applied successfully to the customer account on the Core Banking Application.

message.example: Lien placed successfully on BankOne CBA

post.summary: Upload onboarding document to AWS S3 / Local Disk fallback

parameters.name: activateRequestId
parameters.description: The associated account request UUID (optional if identityVerificationId is provided)

parameters.name: identityVerificationId
parameters.description: The associated Identity Verification session UUID (optional if activateRequestId is provided)

parameters.name: customerId
parameters.description: The associated customer ID (required for customer-specific assets like Photo and ID)

400.description: Invalid upload parameters or file format.

post.summary: Submit referee forms and details for a Current Account opening request

201.description: References successfully submitted for Operations review.

message.example: References submitted successfully for operations review

400.description: Validation failed or not a CURRENT account request.

get.summary: Fetch all referees currently awaiting Operations validation with linked customer and request details

200.description: List of pending referees with enriched request and customer metadata.

get.summary: List references filtered by status (PENDING, PASSED, FAILED) with linked request and customer details

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Filter by PENDING, PASSED, or FAILED

200.description: List of references with enriched request and customer metadata.

post.summary: Operations approves referee form. Auto-triggers CBA opening if all are passed.
Operations rejects referee form. Auto-spawns RM corrective task.

200.description: Referee failed and RM task generated.

rejectionReason.example: The scanned form image is blurred and signature is illegible.

post.summary: RM resubmits a corrected reference form after Operations rejection

200.description: Reference resubmitted and pending Ops re-review.

message.example: Reference resubmitted successfully. Awaiting Operations review.

400.description: Reference is not in FAILED status.

post.summary: Submit Location & Proximity Verification

get.summary: Get details of a location verification record

post.summary: Operations manual review of a pending location check

reason.example: Proof of address matches residential address completely.

post.summary: Submit a Tier 2 Upgrade Request for a Savings Account

201.description: Tier 2 upgrade request submitted and enqueued.

post.summary: Submit a Tier 3 Upgrade Request for a Savings Account (Unified GPS & Address)

get.summary: Retrieve a list of all tier upgrades
Fetch details of a single upgrade request

post.summary: Retry a failed upgrade request

get.summary: Get paginated list of onboarded customers and summary metrics
Get full detail tabs context for a specific customer
Get customer and account details from BankOne by local Customer ID
Get dynamic personalized dashboard metrics (supports RM, Team Lead, and CMO)
Enforce Team Lead reporting dashboard aggregates and breakdown by RM

200.description: Team Lead dashboard stats returned successfully.

get.summary: Enforce CMO directorate-wide dashboard aggregates and Team Lead summaries
